title: Craft TNT from Gravel
description:
This data pack allows you to craft TNT from gravel and gunpowder. 

The sand recipe is also kept so it allows you more choice when crafting TNT.
body:
This data pack allows you to craft TNT from gravel and gunpowder. The sand recipe is also kept so it allows you more choice when crafting TNT.

Compatible with 1.21+.

Confirmed to have worked on 1.21.1
